paragraphs: Colorado’s BMW PPF & Ceramic Coating Experts
Serving THE Denver Metro And surrounding areas

At Front Range Detail Studio in Englewood, CO, we specialize in preserving the beauty, performance, and value of your BMW. Whether you own a sharp M3, a bold X7, or a cutting-edge i4, our dedicated team offers precision paint protection film (PPF), ceramic coatings, and ceramic window tint services—all designed for Colorado’s demanding driving conditions.
We apply premium, self-healing clear film designed to shield your BMW’s paint from rock chips, scratches, road debris, and environmental damage without compromising gloss or clarity.
Each install uses precision-cut patterns tailored to your BMW’s exact body lines, from aggressive M bumpers to aerodynamic side skirts.
Safeguards against magnesium chloride, gravel, UV exposure, and road grime.

Our premium clear, high-gloss PPF featuring hydrophobic ceramic-infused technology and a 12-year warranty. Delivers maximum clarity, self-healing properties, and long-term protection without altering your factory paint color.
A high-performance color-change PPF available in satin, matte, gloss, and bold custom finishes. Restyle your BMW while protecting your original paint underneath, backed by a 12-year warranty.
The complete protection package built specifically for BMW owners in Colorado.
Which services are you interested in:
Locks in a deep, glass-like shine and makes water, dust, and grime bead off effortlessly.
Prevents oxidation and environmental damage, especially critical in Colorado’s high-altitude sun.
Boosts the durability and appearance of your paint protection film.
Whether you drive an M4 Competition or a 530e commuter, ceramic coating preserves your BMW’s finish and value.
Blocks up to 99% of UV rays and dramatically reduces interior heat, keeping your cabin cooler and protecting sensitive materials like leather and carbon trim.
Clean, precision-installed tint enhances your BMW’s aggressive styling.
Our ceramic films are 100% compatible with BMW’s blind-spot monitors, heads-up displays, and cameras.
Most modern BMWs have a softer clear coat, especially M models. PPF and ceramic are highly recommended.
PPF can mask minor flaws, but we always perform paint correction for a flawless finish first.
Yes, we do custom installs for all special BMW trim and aftermarket parts.

“Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I'm very happy with the results.”
— Geri P.

“Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I've ever used...”
— TG G.

“We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat...it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process...”
— Cindy T.
“Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!”
— Alyson W.

“I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won't be disappointed.”
— Steve E.

“On Point!!! Communication, Quality, Customer Service... All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn't need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.”
— Alex

“My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn't try to up sell me...”

“We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.”
— Dean P.

We recently completed a full Front Range Package on a G80 M3 — featuring a Matte paint protection film using SunTek PPF, completely transforming the car’s appearance while shielding it from rock chips and road debris. We followed up with a lifetime warranty ceramic coating on all painted surfaces, glass, and wheels, then finished it off with full ceramic window tint for heat rejection and UV protection. The result? A bold, head-turning, chip-resistant, and maintenance-friendly BMW built to thrive on Colorado roads and look flawless doing it.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car's paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With advanced self-healing technology and ceramic coating, your vehicle stays looking brand new. Protect your investment with our expert application.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car’s paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris.

Our clients have one thing in common: they love their vehicle. From the Class A motorhome to the two-door convertible, our team of detail specialists are equipped and experienced to handle all detailing needs anywhere in Metro Denver.
Monday – Sunday: By Appointment Only

mainEntity.name: Is BMW paint soft or hard?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most modern BMWs have a softer clear coat, especially M models. PPF and ceramic are highly recommended.

mainEntity.name: Does PPF hide rock chips or swirls?

acceptedAnswer.text: PPF can mask minor flaws, but we always perform paint correction for a flawless finish first.

mainEntity.name: Can you do custom coverage for splitters, carbon roofs, etc.?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we do custom installs for all special BMW trim and aftermarket parts.
